verses.text: Josiah in Topa-a' dingin Jerusalem-ah Paisan Pawi bawl hi. Amaute in a kha masa a ni sawmleli ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi
Amah in siampite amau' pan'munte-ah seh a, Topa' biakinn sunga nasepna-ah amaute hanthawn hi

Tua ciangin amah in Israel khempeuh hilhin Topa' tungah a siangtho Levi mite tungah, “Israel kumpipa, David' tapa Solomon in a lam biakinn sungah Thuciamna Singkuang siangtho koih un. Na liangko tung uhah na puak ding uh kisam nawnlo hi. Tu-in Topa na Pasian uh leh ama mi Israel-te' na sem un
Note a khenkhenin na beh uh tawh kizui-in kithawi un la, Israel kumpipa David' lamlahna leh a tapa Solomon' lamlahna zui un
Tua ciangin mi nautang na sanggamte uh beh kikhenna tawh kizui-in siangtho munah ding uh hen la, Levi minam beh tuamtuamte sung pan kihelkim un
Tua ciangin Paisan Pawi bawlna ganhing go-in nomau mah kisian'suah un la, Moses' tung tawnin Topa' thugen bangin na sanggamte uh-a' dingin kithawi un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Josiah in tua lai-a a om mi khempeuhte-a' dingin Paisan Pawi piakna-in a ganhon panin mi nautangte tungah tuunote leh keelnote tul sawmthum ciangdong, leh bawngtal tul thum a pia hi. Hihte pen kumpipa' neihsa sung pan a kipia ahi hi

Tua ciangin ama uliante in zong utna lungsim tawh mite tung, siampite tung, leh Levi mite tungah a pia uh hi. Pasian' biakinn-ah ulianpite ahi Hilkiah, Zekhariah, leh Jehiel-te in siampite tungah Paisan Pawi bawlna dingin tuuno leh keelno tul nih leh za guk, leh bawngtal za thum a pia uh hi
Levi mi ukpite Konaniah, Shemaiah, leh a sanggam Nethanel, Hashabiah, Jeiel leh Jozabad-te in Paisan Pawi piakna dingin Levi mite tungah tuuno leh keelno tul nga, leh bawngtal za nga a pia uh hi
Nasepna ding a kithawi khit uh ciangin, siampite amau' munah ding uh a, kumpipa' thupiakna bangin Levi mite amau' khen sungah om uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Paisan tuuno go uh a, Levi mite in a vun a hawk laitakun siampite in amau' tung panin a ngah uh sisan a theh uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, Moses laibu sungah a kigelh bangin Topa' tungah piak dingin mi nautang sungah a innkuan a pawlpawl tawh kizui-in a hawm theihna dingun meihal biaknate a tuamkoih uh hi. Tua bangin amaute in bawngtalte zong a hih uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in biakna ngeina kip tawh kizui-in Paisan tuuno sa mei-ah a hang uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in beel sung, beelpi sung, leh sikbeel daite sungah a siangtho piaknate huan uh a, mi nautang khempeuh kiangah tuate manlang takin a puak uh hi

Tua khit ciangin amau-a' ding leh siampite-a' dingin amau mah in a sa bawl uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Aaron' suan siampite zankim ciangdong meihal biakna pia-in manlah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in amau-a' ding leh Aaron' suan siampite-a' dingin a sa bawl uh hi

David' thupiak bangin Asaf' behte ahi lasate, leh Asaf, leh Heman, leh kumpipa' thumupa Jeduthun-te amau' munah om uh hi. Kulhkongpi cingte a kulhkongpi ciatah om uh a, amau' sanggam Levi mite in amau-a' dingin sa bawlsak uh ahih manin amau' nasepna pan amaute a paikhiat ding uh kisam lo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Josiah' thupiakna bangin Paisan Pawi bawlna ding leh Topa' biakna tau tungah meihal biaknate piakna dingin tua ni-in Topa' nasepna ding khempeuh a kithawi uh hi
Tua lai-ah a om Israel mite in tua hunin Paisan Pawi, leh Silngo Sawhloh Anlum Pawi ni sagih sung a bawl uh hi

Kamsang Samuel huna kipan Israel sungah tua bang Paisan Pawi kibawl ngeilo hi. Josiah leh siampite leh Levi mite, leh tua lai-ah a om Judah leh Israel mi khempeuh, leh Jerusalem-a a teng mite in a bawl Paisan Pawi tawh a kibang, Israel kumpite kuamah in bawl ngeilo hi
Josiah' uk a kum sawmlegiatna kumin hih Paisan Pawi kibawl hi.
Hih thute khempeuh khit, Josiah in biakinn a bawl khit ciangin, Eufratis gun gei Karkhemish-ah galsim dingin Egypt kumpipa Neko hong kuanto a, amah a do dingin Josiah a kuankhia hi

Ahih hangin Neko in ama kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Judah kumpipa aw, eite gel khatlekhat i kihihna ding bang om ahi hiam? Tu-in nang a sim dingin hong kuan ka hi kei a, ka galte a sim dingin a hong kuan ka hi hi. Ka kinawhna ding Pasian in kei tungah thu hong pia khin hi. Kei tawh a omkhawm Pasian na nialna khawl in. Tua hi kei leh nang hong susia ding hi,” cisak hi
Ahi zongin ama kiang panin Josiah kiheikhia nuamlo a, amah tawh a kido theihna dingin a meel kiseel hi. Amah in Neko' kam pana Pasian' thugente ngailo a, Megiddo zanglei-a gal kidona-ah va pawm hi
Tua ciangin thaltawite in Kumpi Josiah kap hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, “Nakpi takin liam ka hih manin kei hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin a nasemte in leeng sung panin amah lakhia-in ama leeng nihna sungah amah pua-in Jerusalem-ah a paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah si a, a pate' han sungah kivui hi. Judah gam leh Jerusalem khuami khempeuh Josiah' hangin kap uh hi

Jeremiah in zong Josiah' hangin kah la a phuak hi. Numei lasate leh pasal lasate khempeuh in tuni dongin amau' kahna-ah Josiah tamlawh uh hi. Amaute in Israel sungah hih thu biakna ngeina kipin a bawl uh hi. Kah la sungah tuate kikhum hi
Tu-in Josiah' gamtatna a omlaite, leh Topa' thukham sungah a kigelh bangin a nasep hoihte
leh ama gamtatna, a masa leh a nunungte, Israel leh Judah Kumpite' Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi.
